2781.name: Tomb
2781.description: A ring of pale, translucent mushrooms grows here, faintly luminous.

npcs.name: Dajjal the Deceiver
npcs.description: Two crimson eyes pierce through your soul as they stare with burning rage.  A hiss echoes from his barely open mouth, seething with hate.

2776.name: Underground Passage
2776.description: Glowing globes set atop rusted sconces line the walls, illuminating the passage in a soft dim light. Shadows dance and weave about on the surface of the floors and walls. Deep scratches mar the walls on either side of the passageway, something or someone was looking for a way out. A ring of pale, translucent mushrooms grows here, faintly luminous.

2777.name: Underground Passage
2777.description: The passage widens here, a crack in the stone ceiling above allows a trickle of droplets down to the floor. Tiny rivulets run from the pool of water collected near the wall and down the passage. The water smells rather foul, you surmise that you are standing somewhere underneath the broken fountain above. You have lost 1040 experience.

2778.name: Underground Passage
2778.description: The passageway reeks of the foul rivulets of water running alongside the base of the wall. Veins of water slither from the wall and across the passageway staining the stone floor. Black spores, emitting a pungent smell, dot the walls of the passageway, perhaps you should keep your distance.

npcs.name: Djjin the Shadow
npcs.description: There is no individual structure to this creature. It is but a shadowy ghost, a malevolent apparition with an ominous presence and insatiable hunger.

2779.name: Cramped Passageway
2779.description: You find yourself in a cramped tunnel within the underground passageway. The air hangs heavy here in this narrowed portion. A cluster of roots burst down from the ceiling, invading through the cracks of the stone wall, creating a thick tangled web, making it difficult to pass easily.

2780.name: An Altar
2780.description: A large menacing idol dominates the center of this chamber. Carved from a solid block of marble, the statue stands at least 10 feet tall. Its largely grotesque face is grinning, two large crimson stones are set in place of eyes. The remainder of the room is left barren as if the idol was cast off here and forgotten.

2775.name: Beneath the Armory
2775.description: A wisp of webbing hangs from a corner of the stone wall, shimmering in a breeze that you can barely feel. A spiral staircase winds and twists leading above to the dusty armory and down towards an underground corridor. A dim wavering light can be seen below between the cracks of the walls.

2093.name: Grasslands
2093.description: Above you stretch a clear sky dome. The winds gently caress your face as you make your way through the tall grass. The grass here carries a deeper earthy hue, in contrast to the greenish hue to the north. The walls of Oldgate can be seen to the north, south leads to a beaten path.

2094.name: Beaten Path
2094.description: There is a clear absence of tall grass here, the roughly manicured ground makes travel less of a chore. This path must have been well traveled in the past and has seen better days. Small critters scurry beneath your feet looking for a grassy shelter. A sea of yellow stretches as far as the eye can see to the north.

2095.name: Beaten Path
2095.description: The path bends and winds leading to a dark crumpling structure to the south. The terrain is rough and scorched beneath your feet, no grass or plants grow here. The sounds of rustling leaves and songbirds are notably absent only that of your feet striking the packed dirt.

3520.name: Stone Cellar
3520.description: Tiny cracks in the stone wall allow small amounts of moister to seep through, creating dampness throughout the otherwise dry cellar. A cluster of moss and mushroom growing along the edge of the far wall ooze an overpowering odor that is quite impossible to escape. Mossy green shelves line the interior walls, adorned with dusty bottles and jars left discarded years ago. Cold power erupts as an ominous skull knight moves aggressively towards you, holding them back!

npcs.name: Ominous skull knight
npcs.description: Plates of steel have melted and merged with bone.  Two luminous eyes set their gaze in your direction with debilitating severity, watching your every

npcs.name: Reanimated elite knight
npcs.description: Remnants of a chain mail shirt hang loosely around its skeletal torso. In its firm grasp a sword and shield, striking a menacing pose. Wondering

3521.name: Spiral Staircase
3521.description: A welcomed waft of fresh air drifts from above, washing over the dampness of the cellar below. Made from strong oaken wood, the staircase twists and rises upwards towards the interior hall of the tower, below you, stifling air and the underground passageway stretch down deep into the darkness. Lattimus follows up from below. Reminix follows up from below.

3522.name: Upper Landing
3522.description: Piles of debris and rocks litter this hall. Marble pillars and small statuettes that once stood polished and proud, lay here shattered and broken. The ceiling collapsed and has taken out the western wall with it, gazing west from this vantage point one can see much of the forest and old ruins. A decaying odor assaults your nostrils, drifting in from the east. A tall wooden door leading to the eastern room has been torn and hangs loosely from its hinges. Lattimus follows in from the east. Reminix follows in from the east.

npcs.name: Reanimated elite knight
npcs.description: Remnants of a chain mail shirt hang loosely around its skeletal torso. In its firm grasp a sword and shield, striking a menacing pose. Wondering

3523.name: Study Chamber
3523.description: An earthy odor of decay lingers about this shattered room. Fragments of bookcases and their sundered contents litter the floor. Papers and scrolls rot in mold-riddled piles, shattered wooden desks glow in a strange hue as a precarious purple fungus has taken refuge within the shards of the wood. A large window centered behind one of the desks overlooks the courtyard below. Peering out, the dark forest can be seen stretching to the east to meet the walls of Oldgate. Lattimus follows in from the north. Reminix follows in from the north.

npcs.name: Undead high priest
npcs.description: Two eyes of flame gaze in your direction with disappointment and lost

3524.name: Spiral Staircase
3524.description: A welcomed waft of fresh air drifts from above, washing over the dampness of the cellar below. Made from strong oaken wood, the staircase twists and rises upwards towards the interior hall of the tower, below you, stifling air and the underground passageway stretch down deep into the darkness. Lattimus follows down from above. Reminix follows down from above.

3525.name: Private Chamber
3525.description: Faded and grey tapestries deck the stone walls of this massive room. Although they may have once been brilliant and vibrant in shade, they now hang in decaying tatters. Despite their damage, one can perceive striking images of warriors, spell casters, daemons standing side by side in glorious battle. Splinters of wood from broken chairs and tables litter the floor, a large wooden desk dominates the western corner of the room, in relatively great shape notwithstanding the damage of neglect that is apparent in this room. Reminix arrives in from the south. Isneen shields you from the full force of Khanzab the Cruel's attack! (-9) Like lightning, Khanzab the Cruel claws his morningstar at your chest. (28) Reminix chants, "iv amit et ce tal!" Iblis the Fallen's eyes glaze and turn milky white! You thrust at Khanzab the Cruel in vain.

npcs.name: Iblis the Fallen
npcs.description: Two cloven-hoofed legs carry this daemon with astonishing grace.  A pair of fiery incorporeal wings extends fully, glimmering on either side of its

3526.name: Private Chamber
3526.description: Faded and grey tapestries deck the stone walls of this massive room. Although they may have once been brilliant and vibrant in shade, they now hang in decaying tatters. Despite their damage, one can perceive striking images of warriors, spell casters, daemons standing side by side in glorious battle. Splinters of wood from broken chairs and tables litter the floor, a large wooden desk dominates the western corner of the room, in relatively great shape notwithstanding the damage of neglect that is apparent in this room. You see no 'con ibl' here.

npcs.name: Khanzab the Cruel
npcs.description: pure hatred. You feel their growing intensity with each passing moment. A shriek escapes from its cramped mouth as if declaring a battle cry.

3527.name: Private Chamber
3527.description: Faded and grey tapestries deck the stone walls of this massive room. Although they may have once been brilliant and vibrant in shade, they now hang in decaying tatters. Despite their damage, one can perceive striking images of warriors, spell casters, daemons standing side by side in glorious battle. Splinters of wood from broken chairs and tables litter the floor, a large wooden desk dominates the western corner of the room, in relatively great shape notwithstanding the damage of neglect that is apparent in this room. Lattimus follows in from the south. Reminix follows in from the south.

3528.name: Private Chamber
3528.description: Faded and grey tapestries deck the stone walls of this massive room. Although they may have once been brilliant and vibrant in shade, they now hang in decaying tatters. Despite their damage, one can perceive striking images of warriors, spell casters, daemons standing side by side in glorious battle. Splinters of wood from broken chairs and tables litter the floor, a large wooden desk dominates the western corner of the room, in relatively great shape notwithstanding the damage of neglect that is apparent in this room. A higher power shields Khanzab the Cruel from the full force of your attack! (-27) Khanzab the Cruel's eyes roll back in his head as a result of your wicked backstab! (46) Isneen shields you from the full force of Khanzab the Cruel's attack! (-6) Khanzab the Cruel spits and claws at your face. (24)

3529.name: Courtyard
3529.description: The northern corner of the courtyard is dominated by a single withered tree. Wide and thick roots grip the earth with deathly strength. Leafless branches above wind and twist providing a canopy for the restless and weary, rest and refresh your exhausted soul even if it is only for a moment. You can't go that way.

2765.name: Scorched Dirt Path
2765.description: The ground below your feet is dark and charred, allowing no vegetation to grow. The land is barren, you can find neither shade nor shelter. Above you a clear dome, no cloud in sight. A bleak structure can be seen to the south, the great grasslands are a faint distance to the north.

2766.name: Before an Iron-bound Gate
2766.description: The path ends abruptly here before massive black gates. Made from thick layers of wood and reinforced with iron plates these impressive gates may have stood proudly in years past, now they hang off rusted hinges on either side of a great archway. The face of the gates is fitted with long iron spikes to deter any forceful intrusion.

2767.name: Within the Wall
2767.description: You find yourself within the giant walls surrounding the tower. The corridor runs east and west on opposite ends of the gates. Arrow slits line the wall at equal distances facing north, running adjacent the gate. Strategically placed racks of weapons line the opposite wall, should the arrows fail, soldiers are ready to pick up sword and shield.

npcs.name: Reanimated elite knight
npcs.description: Remnants of a chain mail shirt hang loosely around its skeletal torso. In its firm grasp a sword and shield, striking a menacing pose. Wondering

2768.name: Within the Wall
2768.description: Two large boulders were catapulted into the side of the wall leaving a site of wreckage, blocking any movement beyond. Looking past the gaping hole, the sea of grass stretches to the north, on the far side, the walls of the crumpling city of Oldgate can be seen.

npcs.name: Reanimated skeleton archer
npcs.description: A clattering mess of bones and metal, equipped with nothing but a bow, this archer will take aim at anything that moves.

2769.name: Within the Wall
2769.description: Archers can maneuver quite easily in these wide corridors. No illumination beyond what is provided by the arrow slits running down the wall. The corridor continues east and west.

npcs.name: Mischievous ifrit
npcs.description: Standing at four feet tall, it is small and conning.  This creature can dart towards you carrying its ethereal body with frightening vigor.

2770.name: Within the Wall
2770.description: The corridor widens here allowing for more traffic. Quivers of arrows line the interior wall, ample supply to withstand even the worst of encirclement. An archway opens to the south leading to the courtyard.

2771.name: Courtyard
2771.description: You stand in the center of a courtyard, encompassed by tall formidable stone walls. No crevasse or stone out of place. A lone barricaded tower stretches above the eastern wall overlooking the yard. Beneath you, a carpet of soot and dirt cover the ground, all vegetation here is rot. Taking a brief scan of the yard, there is no pleasant foliage to greet you. A fountain that once was functional reigns over the center of the courtyard.

npcs.name: Ominous skull knight
npcs.description: Plates of steel have melted and merged with bone.  Two luminous eyes set their gaze in your direction with debilitating severity, watching your every

2772.name: Courtyard
2772.description: The ground is desolate, nothing but packed earth. Beneath you, remnants of what appears to be a cobble stone path leading north to a gargantuan fruitless tree. Vestige of a crumpling tower looms over the eastern wall. To the west stands a stone building blemished with scars of a battle long forgotten. You have lost 1200 experience.

npcs.name: Mischievous ifrit
npcs.description: Standing at four feet tall, it is small and conning.  This creature can dart towards you carrying its ethereal body with frightening vigor.

2773.name: Stone-room
2773.description: An acrid smell drapes heavily over the air. Inside you see a fairly small room lined with broken dusty shelves. Half empty barrels and crates are strewn about. You surmise that once this room may have been used as a larder, but it has been some time since food has been retrieved from it. A small doorway north leads to a second room.

2774.name: The Armory
2774.description: Armor and weapon racks line the interior walls of this dusty room. Broken and rusty weapons litter the floor. It is evident this armory has not been used in a long time, and all useful weapons have long been seized.

3700.name: Upper Landing
3700.description: Piles of debris and rocks litter this hall. Marble pillars and small statuettes that once stood polished and proud, lay here shattered and broken. The ceiling collapsed and has taken out the western wall with it, gazing west from this vantage point one can see much of the forest and old ruins. A decaying odor assaults your nostrils, drifting in from the east. A tall wooden door leading to the eastern room has been torn and hangs loosely from its hinges. Lattimus follows up from below. Reminix follows up from below.
